overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt of Rivia exploring the candlelit interior of a rustic wooden tavern, then exiting into a sunny rural village with thatched-roof houses and dirt paths. The clip transitions from warm artificial lighting to bright natural daylight as the character moves from the enclosed tavern to the open village environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: rustic tavern interior with wooden beams and hearth

events.description: character turns toward and approaches the exit doorway after exploring the interior

agents.ego_description: walking around the dimly lit tavern interior, passing wooden tables and benches near the stone fireplace

entered.detail: large stone hearth with cooking area and hanging meat
dried meat and herbs suspended from wooden beams near the ceiling
rough wooden dining table with attached bench seating
sloped ceiling made of straw thatch supported by wooden beams
open doorway leading to the outside village

segments.scene_description: The segment shows the interior of a rustic medieval tavern with warm candlelight illuminating wooden walls, a stone fireplace with hanging cured meats, and simple wooden furniture. Geralt walks through the space exploring the environment before turning toward the exit doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural village path between thatched-roof wooden houses

events.description: exits the dark tavern interior through the doorway into bright sunny village outdoors
passes under a wooden archway draped with tattered fabric at the village entrance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through the village, passing wooden fences and traditional houses

notable_agents.action: villager standing near a wooden fence, gesturing with one arm as the player passes
white chicken walking across the dirt path

entered.detail: traditional wooden house with steep straw roof and smoke rising from chimney
unpaved dirt road winding between village buildings
rustic wooden gateway structure with hanging fabric strips
simple wooden fence lining the path

segments.scene_description: The character exits the tavern into a bright sunny village with traditional thatched-roof wooden houses lining a dirt path. He walks past wooden fences and an archway entrance, encountering a villager gesturing near a fence and a chicken crossing the path. The environment shifts from enclosed artificial lighting to open natural daylight with scattered trees and rural architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the warm, enclosed interior of a rustic tavern into the bright, open atmosphere of a sunny rural village. It begins inside the medieval tavern, where candlelight illuminates wooden walls, a stone fireplace with hanging cured meats, and simple furniture as Geralt explores the space. As he turns and moves toward the exit, the scene shifts abruptly from artificial warmth to brilliant natural daylight. The camera then follows him out onto a dirt path lined with traditional thatched-roof houses and wooden fences, passing an archway entrance. Finally, the environment opens up completely to reveal scattered trees and rural architecture, with a gesturing villager and a chicken crossing the path ahead.
